heading: Repealed. –(35), ,Pub. L. 103–325, title VI, § 602(e)(32)108 Stat. 2292Sept. 23, 1994
label: 183 to 186 Repealed. –(35), ,Pub. L. 103–325, title VI, § 602(e)(32)108 Stat. 2292Sept. 23, 1994
notes: Section 183, R.S. § 5222, provided that, within six months of voting to liquidate, an association was to deposit with Treasurer of United States money sufficient to redeem all outstanding circulation.
Section 184, R.S. § 5223, exempted associations which wound up business for purpose of consolidating with another association from requirement to deposit money to redeem all outstanding circulation.
Section 185, R.S. § 5224; , , related to reassignment of bonds to association and redemption of notes.Feb. 18, 1875, ch. 80, § 118 Stat. 320
Section 186, R.S. § 5225; , , related to destruction of redeemed notes by Treasurer.Feb. 27, 1877, ch. 69, § 119 Stat. 252
